description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop composed of five parallel planks, supported by a robust central concrete or metal pedestal. On either side of the table are matching wooden benches, each constructed from two wide planks and supported by angled metal or concrete legs. One bench includes a backrest made from a single horizontal plank, providing additional comfort for users. The table and benches are integrated into a single, cohesive structure, with the benches firmly attached to the main support. The materials and design suggest durability and suitability for outdoor environments, with a natural wood finish contrasting against the industrial gray supports. The overall appearance is functional and inviting, ideal for communal seating in parks or public spaces.
description: A sturdy wooden picnic table with attached benches and a backrest, supported by gray metal or concrete legs. The design is robust and suitable for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full tabletop and both benches, highlighting the plank arrangement and the central support structure.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the tabletop, both benches, and the backrest on the far bench, emphasizing the seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Reverse top-down view focusing on the tabletop and benches from the opposite side, with the backrest visible on the near bench.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backrest and the supporting legs, with the tabletop and benches aligned in parallel.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a central pedestal made of metal or concrete, with angled legs providing stability and connecting to the benches.
